comment.body: ill prob get a lot of hate for saying this... but lutkik is no joke... when 911 killed basically his entire company and brother he had it back up and running within a week i believe. and he paid all the employees big benefits which he basically clawed back the majority of in lawsuits from other parties.  cantor/espeed was the biggest loss of life by any company from 911 i believe... anybody who can deal with that as effectively as he did is no doubt  somebody who u can count on when times get tough...     Ill be excited to read about what happened behind closed doors during all this later when ppl write their books.  lots of other parties need to save face in todays events and sometimes playing the fool is worth the cost depending on the situation.
